properties.sql: SELECT env.c_code AS id, env.c_code AS envelope_code, COALESCE(reg.c_name, env.c_programme_code) AS programme_name, env.c_fiscal_year AS fiscal_year, to_char(CAST(env.c_allocated_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS budgeted_disp, to_char(COALESCE(actual.committed_in_period, 0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS committed_disp, to_char(COALESCE(actual.expensed_in_period, 0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS expensed_disp, to_char(COALESCE(actual.committed_in_period, 0) + COALESCE(actual.expensed_in_period, 0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS actual_disp, CASE WHEN CAST(env.c_allocated_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) - (COALESCE(actual.committed_in_period, 0) + COALESCE(actual.expensed_in_period, 0)) < 0 THEN '' || to_char(CAST(env.c_allocated_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) - (COALESCE(actual.committed_in_period, 0) + COALESCE(actual.expensed_in_period, 0)), 'FM999,999,999.00') || '' ELSE to_char(CAST(env.c_allocated_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) - (COALESCE(actual.committed_in_period, 0) + COALESCE(actual.expensed_in_period, 0)), 'FM999,999,999.00') END AS variance_disp, ROUND(((COALESCE(actual.committed_in_period, 0) + COALESCE(actual.expensed_in_period, 0)) * 100.0) / NULLIF(CAST(env.c_allocated_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)), 0), 1) || '%' AS used_pct, COALESCE(actual.commit_count, 0) AS commit_event_count FROM app_fd_budget_envelope env LEFT JOIN app_fd_mm_registration reg ON reg.c_code = env.c_programme_code LEFT JOIN (SELECT c_envelope_code AS envelope_code, SUM(CASE WHEN c_account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.COMMITTED' AND c_direction = 'debit' THEN CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) WHEN c_account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.COMMITTED' AND c_direction = 'credit' THEN -CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS committed_in_period, SUM(CASE WHEN c_account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.EXPENSED' AND c_direction = 'debit' THEN CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) WHEN c_account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.EXPENSED' AND c_direction = 'credit' THEN -CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS expensed_in_period, count(*) FILTER (WHERE c_account_path LIKE 'ENV_%.COMMITTED' AND c_direction = 'debit') AS commit_count FROM app_fd_budget_event WHERE (NULLIF('#requestParam.from?sql#', '') IS NULL OR datecreated >= NULLIF('#requestParam.from?sql#', '')::timestamp) AND (NULLIF('#requestParam.to?sql#', '') IS NULL OR datecreated < NULLIF('#requestParam.to?sql#', '')::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day') GROUP BY c_envelope_code) actual ON actual.envelope_code = env.c_code ORDER BY env.c_programme_code, env.c_code
